overall.description: First-person driving gameplay from Cyberpunk 2077, navigating through a futuristic neon-lit city at night. The drive begins on commercial streets with heavy holographic advertising, transitions onto a highway where heavy rain begins, and concludes by exiting back into the dense urban city center.

scene_state.functional_zone: neon-lit commercial street with holographic advertisements

events.description: vehicle approaches and crosses a pedestrian crosswalk with white stripes

agents.ego_description: driving through commercial district at moderate speed, navigating past holographic billboards and neon signs

notable_agents.action: person in orange clothing walking on sidewalk near food stall

entered.detail: large floating holographic advertisement displaying a purple-clad figure
tall vertical neon sign with pink lighting
multi-story modern building with reflective glass facade
street lamp emitting warm yellow light

segments.scene_description: Driving through a dense commercial district at night, surrounded by towering holographic billboards and vibrant neon signage. The wet asphalt reflects the colorful lights as the vehicle navigates past pedestrians on sidewalks and crosses marked intersections.

events.description: transitions from commercial street to highway underpass with concrete infrastructure
vehicle accelerates as it enters the main highway lane

agents.ego_description: accelerating onto the highway, leaving the dense commercial area for the open road

entered.detail: large concrete highway overpass structure overhead
yellow and black striped concrete road barriers
green directional highway sign with white text

segments.scene_description: The vehicle transitions from the neon-lit commercial street into a concrete highway underpass. The colorful advertisements give way to stark concrete infrastructure as the car accelerates onto the main highway, entering a more enclosed and artificially lit environment.

events.description: heavy rain begins, reducing visibility and creating wet road conditions
vehicle reaches high speed exceeding 70 km/h on the highway

agents.ego_description: driving at high speed on the highway through heavy rain, windshield wipers active

notable_agents.action: oncoming vehicle with headlights visible in the rain

entered.detail: tall green noise-reduction barrier wall along the highway
continuous row of overhead street lamps illuminating the road

segments.scene_description: Driving at high speed along an elevated highway as heavy rain begins to fall. The green sound barriers line the right side while overhead lights illuminate the wet road surface. The transition from clear to rainy conditions creates a dramatic atmosphere with reduced visibility and reflective wet asphalt.

scene_state.functional_zone: highway tunnel and elevated sections with metal barriers

events.description: enters covered tunnel section with concrete walls and reduced lighting
maintains high speed around 80 km/h through curved highway section

agents.ego_description: navigating highway curves at high speed through tunnel sections and past metal barriers

entered.detail: silver metal safety fence with horizontal bars
smooth concrete tunnel wall with horizontal lines

segments.scene_description: The vehicle continues at high velocity through alternating open and covered highway sections. Metal fence barriers replace the green walls as the road curves through tunnel-like structures. The rain continues to fall heavily, creating a rhythmic pattern on the windshield as the car maintains speeds around 80 km/h.

scene_state.functional_zone: city center commercial district with dense neon signage

events.description: exits highway and enters city center district with dense neon advertisements
vehicle slows significantly to navigate city streets and intersections

agents.ego_description: slowing down while navigating through the city center, passing pedestrians and street-level shops

notable_agents.action: pedestrian standing on sidewalk near building entrance

entered.detail: tall building covered in bright neon signage and advertisements
massive floating holographic display with multiple colors
contemporary building with illuminated glass exterior

segments.scene_description: Exiting the highway back into the dense urban environment of the city center. The vehicle slows down to navigate streets lined with towering neon signs and holographic advertisements. Pedestrians reappear on sidewalks as the car moves through the wet, reflective streets of the downtown commercial district.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person drive that begins in a vibrant commercial district, transitions into a rainy highway corridor, and eventually returns to the dense urban city center. It begins by navigating through towering holographic billboards and neon signage that reflect off the wet asphalt, before the colorful advertisements give way to the stark concrete of a highway underpass. As the vehicle accelerates onto the elevated highway, the environment shifts into a dramatic, rain-swept landscape characterized by green sound barriers and overhead lights that illuminate the falling rain. The scene then moves through a series of alternating open and covered sections with metal fence barriers and tunnel-like structures, maintaining high velocity through the heavy downpour. Finally, the camera exits the highway and slows down as it re-enters the downtown district, where the towering neon signs and pedestrians reappear amidst the reflective, rain-slicked streets.
